section_analysis.description: Intense internal monologue. Piano-driven emotional atmosphere. Focus on 'Body and Soul'.
Melodic explosion. 'Yubikitta' (Pinky Sworn) hook. Focus on the proof of love.

lyrics.original: 指切りった 今日の日の誓い
lyrics.romaji: Yubikitta kyou no hi no chikai
lyrics.meta: Signature motif. The act of the pinky swear.

lyrics.original: 愛の証を見せてあげるわ
lyrics.romaji: Ai no akashi wo misete ageru wa

stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Grand Piano, Electric Guitar, Emotive Bass
